comment: Baselines for tests/integration/test_run_evaluate_cross_version_metrics.py. Tolerances are intentionally loose enough to absorb small cross-version/library drift, but should still catch meaningful changes. Note: the evaluate harness's tiny_test ends up with 6 test samples (you'll see logs like 'Test data size : 6 samples'), so test_accuracy moves in steps of 1/6≈0.167; atol=0.12 is set below that so a single-sample swing is still flagged.
